lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did the Pharisees and Bible teachers wonder about Jesus?
answers: Why He spent time with sinners
Why He didn't wash his hands

questions.text: What did the shepherd do when one of his 100 sheep was lost?
answers: He left the 99 to go look for it

questions.text: How did the woman find her lost coin?
answers: She lit a lamp and swept her house
She asked her neighbors to help
She waited for it to turn up

questions.text: What did the younger son ask his father for?
answers: His inheritance before his father died

questions.text: What happened to the money the younger son received?
answers: He wasted it all on wild living
He used it to buy a camel
He gave it to the poor

questions.text: How did the father respond when his lost son returned?
answers: He was overjoyed and ran to him
He refused to talk to his son

questions.text: In these parables, who do the sheep, coin, and son represent?
Who do the shepherd, the woman, and the father represent?
Why did Jesus come to earth?
answers: To find and rescue lost sinners
To see what it was like to be a human
